cycles.title: git_delete_branch mode enum
cycles.exit_criteria: All existing + new delete_branch tests pass; mode=local preserves old local-only behavior; mode=both is default; mode=remote skips current-branch check; remote-absent returns absent not error; mode=both with missing local side returns local_status=absent not an error; BranchDeleteResult is frozen dataclass; ruff+mypy clean

deliverables.description: GitDeleteBranchInput.mode: Literal['local','remote','both'] = 'both'
GitDeleteBranchTool.execute passes mode to manager; renders BranchDeleteResult
BranchDeleteResult frozen dataclass with local_status + remote_status Literal fields
GitManager.delete_branch orchestrates local/remote/both; returns BranchDeleteResult; current-branch check skipped for mode=remote
GitAdapter.delete_local_branch (renamed from delete_branch)
GitAdapter.delete_remote_branch returns deleted or absent; absent is not an error
test_git_tools.py updated + new tests for mode=local/remote/both/remote-absent
test_all_tools.py updated + new mode-coverage tests
test_git_manager_config.py updated to new signature + new remote/both mode tests
test_git_adapter.py updated to delete_local_branch + new TestGitAdapterDeleteRemoteBranch including remote-absent
TestGitManager.test_delete_branch_valid and test_delete_branch_protected updated; mock assertions delete_branch -> delete_local_branch

cycles.title: end-issue lifecycle-exit prompt
cycles.exit_criteria: end-issue.prompt.md exists with approved flow; end-issue.prompt.md declares @co as owning agent; human invocation is the merge-approval signal (no automated merge trigger); close_issue() absent from normative path; git_diff_stat absent from normative merge-proof; close-issue.prompt.md does not exist

deliverables.description: close-issue.prompt.md deleted
end-issue.prompt.md created with approved contract-level flow

cycles.title: ready-phase PR body contract
cycles.exit_criteria: All six ready blocks carry unified deferred-work-in-body instruction; six ready blocks include explicit Closes #N decision step; six ready blocks include closure-readiness review step; six ready blocks treat handover template as completeness-check gate; six ready blocks include original-issue-body honesty check (update issue body before PR creation when scope changed); PRContext optional fields do not break existing callers; template renders deferred-work section conditionally; all existing and new tests green; ruff+mypy clean

deliverables.description: Six ready blocks in contracts.yaml: unified deferred-work-in-body instruction
PRContext.deferred_work: str | None = None
PRContext.tracking_state: str | None = None
pr.md.jinja2 renders Deferred Work section when deferred_work is set
Template tests extended for deferred-work section rendering
PRContext schema test extended for new optional fields
Six ready blocks: explicit Closes #N decision step, closure-readiness review for all in-scope issues, handover-template-as-completeness-check obligation

Six ready blocks updated: original issue body honesty check — before PR creation, verify that the original issue body still accurately describes branch intent and in-scope breadth; update the issue body when research widened or changed the scope

cycles.title: documentation and wording alignment
cycles.exit_criteria: git.md and MCP_TOOLS.md document mode with three values and migration note; project.md no longer says runtime-not-committed for state.json; both agent.md files contain branch-local state wording; contracts.yaml commit steps include first-push for feature/bug/refactor/docs/hotfix; no ruff/mypy impact

deliverables.description: git.md: mode param documented with migration note and examples
MCP_TOOLS.md: git_delete_branch updated with mode param and migration note
project.md line ~36: state.json described as branch-local + committed, neutralized by submit_pr
imp.agent.md: branch-local state artifact wording added
co.agent.md: branch-local state artifact wording added
contracts.yaml: git_push(set_upstream=True) on same line as first checkpoint commit for feature/bug/refactor/docs/hotfix
